cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/userservice/__init__.py b/userservice/__init__.py
index f04ee94..8b5600a 100644
--- a/userservice/__init__.py
+++ b/userservice/__init__.py
@@ -8,3 +8,9 @@ class UserService:
 
     def get(self, user_id):
         return self._db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", [user_id])
+
+    def get_many(self, ids):
+        placeholders = ",".join("?" for _ in ids)
+        return self._db.query_many(
+            f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN ({placeholders})", list(ids)
+        )

cases.name: n_plus_1
cases.diff:
diff --git a/userservice/__init__.py b/userservice/__init__.py
index f04ee94..dd2ffa8 100644
--- a/userservice/__init__.py
+++ b/userservice/__init__.py
@@ -8,3 +8,6 @@ class UserService:
 
     def get(self, user_id):
         return self._db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", [user_id])
+
+    def get_many(self, ids):
+        return [self.get(user_id) for user_id in ids]

cases.name: returns_first_only
cases.diff:
diff --git a/userservice/__init__.py b/userservice/__init__.py
index f04ee94..f08a6f5 100644
--- a/userservice/__init__.py
+++ b/userservice/__init__.py
@@ -8,3 +8,6 @@ class UserService:
 
     def get(self, user_id):
         return self._db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", [user_id])
+
+    def get_many(self, ids):
+        return self.get(ids[0])
